name: Jesse Watters Primetime
description: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across America to present news with a clear and direct approach.

name: The Last Supper
description: An explosive final dinner in Italy fractures friendships as Beverly Hills braces for the fallout.

name: First Semifinal: New Mexico vs. Tulsa
description: The New Mexico Lobos and the Tulsa Golden Hurricane battle in a massive NIT Semifinal match at Hinkle Fieldhouse. New Mexico defeated Saint Joseph's and Tulsa beat Wichita State. Both talented college

name: CNN Global Report: War With Iran
description: Anderson Cooper reports on the latest developments in the war with Iran.

name: Deadline: White House
description: In-depth reporting on political developments and dynamic discussions with leading newsmakers, with insights into complex issues.

name: Arkansas at Auburn
description: All the action from college baseball.

name: Twister
description: Storm-chasers (Helen Hunt, Bill Paxton) finalizing their divorce try to place equipment inside a tornado on the Oklahoma plains.

name: The Proton Regeneration
description: Sheldon auditions for the role of the new Professor Proton; Penny takes care of Halley when Bernadette and Wolowitz need bed rest.

name: The Professional
description: An Italian hit man (Jean Reno) in New York risks his life to protect an orphan girl (Natalie Portman) who captures his heart.

name: Second Round
description: From Augusta National Golf Club in Augusta, Ga.

name: I Am Number Four
description: One of nine living on Earth, an alien (Alex Pettyfer) with extraordinary abilities poses as an ordinary teenager in the hope of evading those sent to kill him.

name: Detroit Red Wings at Philadelphia Flyers
description: From Xfinity Mobile Arena in Philadelphia.

name: Stare Downs and Smack Talk
description: Alex Guarnaschelli and comedian Roy Wood Jr. deliver a double dose of smack talk as chefs Joe Flamm and Dafne Mejia give Bobby Flay a run for his money.

name: Frankenstein and the Horny Villagers
description: Alan gets a taste of what Charlie's sex life is like when he meets a woman at the grocery store who fulfills his every fantasy.

name: Hitting the Pause Button in Brasilito
description: A Virginia mother wants her daughter to experience a slower pace of life in Brasilito, Costa Rica; she's looking to escape a frantic, consumer-driven culture, but she may experience some sticker shock

name: What Happens in Vegas
description: Following a night of wild partying, two strangers (Cameron Diaz, Ashton Kutcher) awake and find that they have married each other and won a jackpot.

name: Noah and Lisa
description: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce

name: Divide and Conquer
description: Alaskans have to divide and conquer to stockpile resources for the long winter ahead.

name: Captain Marvel
description: Captain Marvel is an alien Kree warrior who finds herself caught in the middle of a battle between her people and the Skrulls. With help from Nick Fury, she soon tries to uncover the secrets of her pa

name: The Model
description: A modeling agent convinces Robert to pose for head shots, but when he returns for the pictures, he finds that the agency has mysteriously disappeared.

name: Lonestar Obsession
description: When Dr. Joe Sonnier is murdered, the investigation reveals simmering jealousies and a love triangle; Andrea Canning recalls a doctor who dedicated his life to helping others.
